entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: Cultivated groundnut (Arachis hypogaea) evaluated for resistance to aflatoxin contamination

entities.name: WILD ARACHIS
entities.description: Wild Arachis species accessions evaluated for resistance to aflatoxin contamination

entities.name: ASPERGILLUS FLAVUS
entities.description: Fungus responsible for seed colonization and aflatoxin production

entities.name: AFLATOXIN CONTAMINATION
entities.description: Infection by Aspergillus flavus and the subsequent production of aflatoxin

entities.name: AFLATOXIN PRODUCTION
entities.description: The process of producing aflatoxin by Aspergillus flavus

entities.name: SEED COLONIZATION
entities.description: The ability of a pathogen to colonize the seeds of a crop

entities.name: SEED INVASION
entities.description: The ability of a pathogen to invade the seeds of a crop

entities.name: RESISTANCE TO AFLATOXIN CONTAMINATION
entities.description: The ability of a plant genotype to resist infection by Aspergillus flavus and aflatoxin production

entities.name: IN VITRO
entities.description: Experimental technique performed in a controlled environment outside a living organism

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics, which maintains a collection of wild Arachis accessions
